narrative:
Precinct Huber Heights B (precinct in Miami County) has 957 registered voters, with 68.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 14.7 percentage points.
